_note: UI copy shared by web and iOS. Voice rules in voice.md. {name} and {who} are replaced at render. Guardrail strings mirror the actual API responses (web/app/api/*) — keep them in sync.

brand.name: GRQ
brand.tagline: Get rich quick, slowly, with receipts.

splash.rainNote: US dollar bills rain down, tumbling, then settle/fade into the welcome. Honor accessibilityReduceMotion → skip the rain, keep the welcome.
splash.subtitle: Rich quick, slowly.
splash.welcomeSource: Use the wealth-aware greeting from daily.json (banded by P&L). 'welcome' here is only the fallback before P&L loads — fetch /api/auth/me for name + totalPnlCents + contributionsCents to pick the right band on first paint.

auth.notAllowed: That account isn't on the fund. GRQ is invite-only.
auth.expired: Session expired — sign in again to keep the receipts straight.

today.label: Today
today.blurb: The Daily — your fund as a newspaper.

market.label: Market
market.blurb: The universe, the movers, and names worth a look.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.blurb: What the fund holds, and how it's doing.

ideas.label: Ideas
ideas.blurb: Dossiers, signals, and the agent's calls.

settings.label: Settings
settings.blurb: Risk dial, members, and the kill switch.

emptyStates.noHoldings: Nothing held yet. The robot is still shopping.
emptyStates.noIdeas: No dossiers filed yet. The agent researches before it buys.
emptyStates.noActivity: Quiet so far. The receipts will show up here.
emptyStates.noMovers: Flat tape today. Even the robot is bored.
emptyStates.offline: Can't reach the fund right now. Check your connection — your money is fine.

guardrails.killEngaged: Kill switch ENGAGED. Nothing trades until a member releases it.
guardrails.killReleased: Kill switch released — the order gate is open again.
guardrails.faceIdReason: Confirm it's you before changing the fund.
guardrails.orderBlockedGeneric: Trade blocked at the gate. The reason is shown plainly — the guardrails don't bend.

killSwitch.confirmEngage: Halt all trading now? Nothing trades until a member turns it back on.

literacy.termHint: Tap any underlined term for a plain-English definition.
literacy.hypothesisNote: Price targets are the agent's hypothesis — not a promise.
